{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Scripted collar
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A scripted collar can choke [[madra]] at the source.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
